title: acalypha arvensis var. genuina
intro: Acalypha arvensis var. genuina is a plant species commonly known as the red stem acalypha or prickly acalypha, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Acalypha arvensis var. genuina is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are used in modern herbal medicine to create creams, ointments, and salves for topical application.
